channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Vampire Survivors' Wet Update Launches Soon
item.description: The upcoming 'Wet Update' for Vampire Survivors promises exciting new content. Players can expect fresh features and enhancements to the beloved game.

item.title: YouTube Premium Price Increase: Will You Cancel?
item.description: YouTube Premium's price hike takes effect this month, prompting users to consider cancellation. The increase raises questions about subscription value.

item.title: Fitbit Air: Great Tracker, But AI Coach Lacks
item.description: The Fitbit Air excels as a minimalist fitness tracker, but Google's AI Health Coach feels overly gentle and unnecessary. Users may prefer traditional coaching methods.

item.title: Ubisoft Revives 3D Rayman Games with New Release
item.description: Ubisoft confirms the launch of Rayman Legends Retold for Nintendo Switch 2 on October 1. Fans are excited about the charming visual style and gameplay.

item.title: Last Chance for Discounted Switch Gems in Indie Sale
item.description: Nintendo's eShop Indie Sale features top-rated games at discounted prices. Don't miss out on these 9/10+ rated titles before the sale ends.

item.title: Apple's WWDC: New Hardware Launches Expected?
item.description: Apple may unveil new hardware at WWDC, despite it being primarily a software event. Anticipation builds for potential announcements.

item.title: Top 10 Nintendo Switch 2 Games Revealed
item.description: Celebrating one year of the Switch 2, here are the top games to play on Nintendo's latest console. The list highlights its commercial success.

item.title: Trump Phone: Assembled in the USA, Not Made
item.description: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone is only assembled in the US, raising questions about domestic manufacturing capabilities. Full production in the US is nearly impossible.

item.title: Elden Ring Nintendo Switch 2 Footage Released
item.description: New direct-feed footage of Elden Ring Tarnished Edition for Nintendo Switch 2 has been released, following its anticipated announcement. Fans are eager for more details.

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026: Live Report
item.description: The Summer Game Fest showcase is the highlight of the summer gaming season, featuring major announcements and news. Coverage is ongoing.

item.title: Gothic Remake Released Today
item.description: The remake of the classic RPG Gothic is now available, enhancing the original's detailed world. Players can explore its revamped prison setting.

item.title: New Safer Power Banks with Semi-Solid-State Tech
item.description: New semi-solid-state magnetic power banks are now available, offering improved safety and Qi2 charging. These innovative devices were first unveiled at CES 2026.

item.title: Big Corporations Should Leave LOTR Alone
item.description: Critics urge corporations to stop exploiting The Lord of the Rings IP for profit. The cancellation of Amazon's MMO is seen as a positive step.

item.title: Subnautica 2: Upcoming Content Drop Details
item.description: Unknown Worlds outlines future plans for Subnautica 2, including a new region. The studio shifts focus from quick fixes to substantial updates.

item.title: Dell's New XPS 13 vs. Apple MacBook Neo
item.description: Dell's $699 XPS 13 impresses in side-by-side comparisons with the Apple MacBook Neo at Computex. It may be the best budget laptop of the year.
